task_description: Create a comprehensive demo seed file (seed-demo.ts) that populates all tables from migrations 005-014 with 30 days of realistic data for a client demo. Runs after the main seed.ts.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly with both `tsc` and `npx tsc --noEmit`. All 80+ tables from migrations 005-014 are seeded. Package.json script seed:demo added. File is 2047 lines covering notifications, clinical features, HR/finance, mobile/analytics, quality of life, and all missing tables.
